label: Adobe Commerce SaaS (out-of-process)
_note: The out-of-process Commerce dev model — NO PHP backend. Custom logic lives in App Builder + API Mesh, the storefront in EDS drop-in blocks. Toolchain: Node + aio + git. BUILDS ON app-builder + eds — activate those first; this product's flows reuse their generators. Its Class C connectors (API Mesh · Live Search · Catalog Service · Recommendations · Data Connection · Payment Services) ARE the SaaS dev surface.

_toCreate.status: These files do NOT exist yet — created when this product is activated (after app-builder + eds). Until then `editions` is empty and the build skips this product.
sources: likely REUSE app-builder's aio source rather than duplicate an aio.mjs here
